title: astragalus tauricus subsp. scopaeformis
intro: Astragalus tauricus subsp. scopaeformis, also known as the Scopaeformis subalpine milkvetch, is a plant species in the legume family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus tauricus subsp. scopaeformis include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Astragalus tauricus subsp. scopaeformis can be prepared as an herbal remedy through various methods, including teas, infusions, and dried extracts.
